scale.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-extrabold text-slate-900 font-['Sora']
scale.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl tracking-tight font-bold text-slate-900 font-['Plus_Jakarta_Sans']
scale.overline: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#5139ED] font-['Plus_Jakarta_Sans']

colors.theme_logic: Strictly light mode per problem statement requirements.

glassmorphism.rule: Only use over subtle background elements or faint colored blobs. Never fully transparent without blur.

motifs.description: Scientific/biomedical visual motifs (molecule graphs, network nodes). Use abstract intersecting lines or faint dotted grids in the background, specifically tinted with #5139ED at very low opacity (e.g. 5%). Avoid generic AI-slop.

hero.composition: Centered layout. Large Sora H1 headline. Subheading directly beneath. Generous spacing. Action area containing the primary 'Plant Database' CTA. Background should feature a subtle blue abstract network (opacity < 10%).

features_grid.composition: Bento style or standard 4-column grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4) with generous gap-6 or gap-8. Cards must be glassmorphic with white background. 1 active card, 7 'Coming soon' cards visually distinct (dimmed or locked state).

plant_database.composition: Search tool layout. Top section: large centered search bar with mode-switcher tabs (Plant name / LOTUS exact / LOTUS simple / etc.) above it. Filter section: Checkboxes for selectable output fields inline or as a collapsible sidebar. Main section: Full-width results table.

grids_and_layouts.spacing: Generous. py-24 or py-32 for sections. gap-8 for grids. p-8 for cards. Containers with borders must have internal padding to prevent collision.

buttons.primary: bg-[#5139ED] hover:bg-[#4228C4] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold transition-transform duration-200 ease-out shadow-md hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#5139ED] border border-[#5139ED]/20 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold transition-colors duration-200

cards.base: bg-white border border-slate-100 shadow-[0_2px_20px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] rounded-2xl p-6 transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-[0_10px_40px_rgb(81,57,237,0.12)] hover:-translate-y-1

search_bar.base: w-full max-w-3xl flex items-center bg-white border-2 border-slate-200 focus-within:border-[#5139ED] focus-within:ring-4 focus-within:ring-[#5139ED]/10 rounded-full p-2 pl-6 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200

table.header: bg-slate-50/80 text-slate-600 font-semibold text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.05em] py-4 px-6 border-y border-slate-200

motion.entrance: Use framer-motion for staggered fade-in up (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1) on feature cards.
motion.interactions: Micro-animations on buttons and checkboxes (scale 0.95 on tap).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure #5139ED on white exceeds 4.5:1. Use text-slate-900 for main headings and text-slate-700 for body.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes.

image_urls.description: Abstract blue background with lines and dots. Use as a very subtle, low-opacity (5-10%) background behind the hero or global wrapper.
White molecular structure 3D render. Use as a decorative accent image for the 'Molecular Dynamics' or 'Compound Extractor' feature cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML + Tailwind for marketing layouts (Hero, Features Grid). Avoid rigid structural Shadcn components here.
Use Shadcn UI components for complex logic (Tables, Tabs, Checkboxes, Pagination) but customize their styling heavily to match these guidelines.
For the 2D compound structures, integrate SmilesDrawer to render the SMILES strings inside the table cells. Ensure the canvas size is appropriate.
Implement the mode-switcher as Shadcn Tabs right above the main search bar in the Plant Database page.
Ensure 'Coming Soon' feature cards are visually distinct (e.g. grayscale, locked icon, opacity 60%) and non-clickable.
Adhere exactly to the color palette. No extraneous colors.
Create a clean, clinical yet modern vibe. Do NOT use heavy dark mode gradients. Stick to the white background.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons. Use standard professional icons (lucide-react).
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Use sonner for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx.
